title: Resolve api.json paths from per-package artifact roots

source.subject: fix(doc): resolve api.json paths from per-package artifact roots

body:
Documentation emission resolves `api.json` relative to each package's artifact root instead of a single workspace-relative path, fixing pckg ingestion for multi-package workspaces.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`5f0f2c9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/5f0f2c9)
- **Subject:** fix(doc): resolve api.json paths from per-package artifact roots
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `pckg-registry`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-post-merge-ci`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CI and integration hardening** (`v03-post-merge-ci`).
